testcase.name: test_parse_rules_adds_leaf_only_dependencies
test_build_order_dependency_first

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert ['parse', 'li...'deploy', ...] == ['parse', 'sc...'deploy', ...]
At index 1 diff: 'lint' != 'scan' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure:
def test_build_order_dependency_first(): """A valid build order must place every dependency before its dependents.""" graph = parse_rules(RULES) > assert build_order(graph) == [ "parse", "scan", "compile", "lint", "build", "deploy", "test", "package", ] E AssertionError: assert ['parse', 'li...'deploy', ...] == ['parse', 'sc...'deploy', ...] E E At index 1 diff: 'lint' != 'scan' E Use -v to get more diff
test_buggy.py:63: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_hidden_parse_rules_strips_whitespace
testcase.failure:
def test_hidden_parse_rules_strips_whitespace(): """Whitespace around a target name should not leak into the graph key.""" graph = parse_rules([" build : parse scan ", "parse:", "scan:"]) > assert graph["build"] == {"parse", "scan"} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'build'
test_buggy.py:154: KeyError
